notes.World of Hyatt: Best-in-class cpp on cash-equivalent redemptions; 1.7c is floor, ceiling >2.5c on high-category off-peak.
notes.Marriott Bonvoy: 0.8c floor reflects dynamic pricing post-2023 devaluation; 5th-night-free pushes effective up ~25% on 5-night stays.
notes.Hilton Honors: 0.5c is honest floor; many high-end properties price at 0.3-0.4c — verify per redemption.
notes.IHG One Rewards: 0.5c floor; PointBreaks-style promos historically pushed higher but are now rare.
notes.Wyndham Rewards: Flat 7.5K/15K/30K tiers create 1.0c+ outliers; floor stays at 1.0c for ranking.
notes.Accor Live Limitless (ALL): Fixed 2c — points-plus-cash mechanic at any increment, behaves like cash credit.
notes.Radisson Rewards Americas: Separate program from Radisson Rewards EMEA; thin redemption book.
notes.Leaders Club Preferred: Status program, not a points currency — value is upgrades + perks, not cpp.
notes.Stash Hotel Rewards: Independent-hotel program; cash-redeemable at fixed ratios.
notes.Wyndham Diamond: Status tier benefits more than points; cpp inherits from Wyndham Rewards.
notes.Sonesta Travel Pass: Post-IHG-split program; thin chart, conservative floor.
